The '''''Lightning Rod''''' was a small, beat-up [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by [[Peckhum]], who used it to deliver shipments to various clients, the most notable being [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Peckhum also used the ship to get to his [[Orbital Solar Energy Transfer Satellite]], in which he used a large mirror to focus warmth and sunlight from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Coruscant Prime/Legends|Coruscant Prime]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] extreme northern and southern latitudes, warming the environment by a few degrees to make more of the land area on the ecumenopolis habitable. The ship also ferried Peckhum to [[Ennth]] at one time, after he heard about the natural disasters and went to help.

Following the [[Third Battle of Yavin|the siege]] of the Jedi Praxeum by the [[Shadow Academy]] in [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]], Peckhum gave her to the redeemed [[Zekk]], who used it during his career as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

Luckily for Zekk, the ''Lighting Rod'' contained weapons, which Peckhum agreed to install only after the assault on Yavin 4 by the [[Shadow Academy]].

While in the ''[[Rock Dragon]]'' near the [[The Graveyard|debris of Alderaan]] to get a present for [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Lowbacca]], and [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] came under attack by a ship which appeared to be [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in a [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|''Firespray-31''-class patrol and attack craft]] designated ''Slave IV''. In actuality, it was [[Ailyn Vel]] masquerading as her father, and the young [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] were saved by Zekk in the ''Lightning Rod''.

The ''Lightning Rod'' was stolen by [[Anja Gallandro]], who took it to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. Anja returned it to Zekk later.
